Admin Testing card displays blue pod info section with 'Alpha Team' name and 'technician' role badge. Employees NOT in pods (Ben Carter Kyle, Cleaner T., Testing Pods Functionality Testing, Asco b) correctly do NOT show pod info section. Total Employees stat correctly shows 5 (merged count). Search filter works after merge.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested employee cards pod info display. The merge logic in EmployeesManagement.jsx works correctly - it fetches employees, pods (with member details), and users in parallel, then merges pod members not already in the employees list. Admin Testing (user_id=e922ec7e-ebdd-4c90-8be7-174459782dd5) is the only pod member in Alpha Team and correctly shows the blue pod info section. The notifications API continues to fail with mixed content (HTTP vs HTTPS) - pre-existing issue from iteration 33.
